meta.northy_message: Holiday weekend. Nothing moved — which is fine. But Monday morning the clock resumes: Garland is 5 days past deadline, CFB ISD uses the same unpulled Moak Casey lever ($162K on one call), and Lubbock ISD (21K students) is a new SB 13 lead Teela surfaced. Pipeline: $478K live in HubSpot — data exists, just doesn't reach anyone. 52 days blind.

act_now.title: Garland + CFB ISD — One Call to Jodi Duron = $162K. 5 Days Past Deadline.
act_now.detail: Garland ISD ($140,391) — June 30 deadline. 5 days past. HubSpot: Contract Sent, next step 'Strategic outreach to Garland.' CFB ISD ($22,082) has SAME next step: 'Steve to get Jodi from Moak Casey to connect with Wendy-Sup.' One phone call covers both. Neither lever pulled.
act_now.action: Call Jodi Duron Monday morning. 'Jodi — can you email Dr. Lopez at Garland AND Wendy at CFB? What do you need from me?' One call. Two deals.

act_now.title: Pipeline Blind — 52 Days Stale. Live HubSpot Shows $478K Active TX Deals.
act_now.detail: Fresh HubSpot pull: 20+ active TX deals ~$478K. Top 5: Garland ($140K, Contract Sent), Cy-Fair ($107K, Presentation Scheduled), Pearland ($50K, DM Buy-In), Grand Prairie ($24K), CFB ($22K). Zig confirmed July 3: HubSpot → G-Brain ingestion never built. Allowlist ready. 1-day build. Known since June 26.
act_now.action: Forge/Raju: build HubSpot → G-Brain ingestion script. Steve: approve if needed. Blocking entire strategy data layer.

act_now.title: Security — dev-dca.bookmarked.com Subdomain Takeover. Still Unaddressed.
act_now.detail: Zig flagged July 3. Still untriaged Sunday night. Subdomain takeovers = phishing, credential harvesting, brand damage risk. Should be triaged immediately, not queued for 'next week.'
act_now.action: Patrick or Raju: triage dev-dca Monday morning. Remove dangling DNS record or reclaim resource. 15-minute fix.

act_now.title: Revenue Target Contradiction — 10th Scan. Three Numbers, Zero Resolution.
act_now.detail: L10: 5-10M ambition. Jan/Steve July 1: '$1M by Sept 1.' Zig: $1.39M gap computation. Three different targets across three conversations. Team classifies deals against different goals. July reset was supposed to fix this.
act_now.action: ONE Slack to #sales_revenue-ninjas Monday: 'Canonical target is $1M by Sept 1. Every deal classification, every forecast, every Monday update — flows from that.'

act_now.title: Atlas HubSpot Token — 10th Scan. 24 ISDs in Media Tracker, Zero CRM Touchpoints.
act_now.detail: Dewey asked 7+ times. Steve told Dewey to route directly June 27. July 2 meeting confirmed it's THE one item. Token still not injected. One admin approval unlocks media→CRM pipeline.
act_now.action: Approve BRIDGE.md HubSpot token injection for Atlas. Reply in #ai-ceo-team.
